description.p: OpenSave keeps your game saves in sync across every device you play on — PC, laptop, Steam Deck — with no accounts and no server required. It watches your save folders, snapshots them the moment a game writes, and syncs devices directly over LAN or through a relay.

ul.li: Auto-detects save locations for over 20,000 games, emulators, and repacks
Per-game snapshots with one-click restore and branching
Direct device-to-device sync with content-based conflict detection
Optional cloud mirroring to Google Drive, Dropbox, or OneDrive
Steam Deck aware: finds saves inside Proton prefixes and on SD cards
